meta.name: Ferni Content Tokens
meta.description: Brand-compliant microcopy, messages, and content patterns

voice._description: Voice principles that guide all copy

conversations.headline: Every great friendship starts somewhere.
conversations.body: We're here whenever you're ready to talk. No pressure, no judgment—just a voice that listens.

team.headline: Meet Ferni first.
team.body: As we get to know each other, more specialists will join your team. It's not about gatekeeping—it's about building a relationship that matters.

progress.headline: The path is waiting.
progress.body: After a few conversations, we'll start to see patterns—the growth, the wins, the moments that matter. For now, just talk.

wins.headline: We're watching for wins.
wins.body: Every time you follow through, show courage, or take care of yourself, we'll celebrate. The first win is just a conversation away.

boundaries.headline: Your space, your rules.
boundaries.body: As we learn what matters to you—and what doesn't—we'll remember. We're here to respect your boundaries, not test them.

insideJokes.headline: Shared history takes time.
insideJokes.body: The inside jokes, the callbacks, the "remember when"s—they come from conversations. Let's make some memories.

notifications.headline: All caught up.
notifications.body: When something matters, we'll let you know.

noResults.headline: Nothing quite matched that.
noResults.body: Try different words, or browse instead.

noFilters.headline: Nothing here with those filters.
noFilters.body: Try removing some filters to see more.

temporary.headline: Taking a breath.
temporary.body: We lost connection for a moment. Trying to reconnect now...

failed.headline: We couldn't reconnect.
failed.body: Something's getting in the way. Check your internet connection and try again.

serverDown.headline: We're taking a moment.
serverDown.body: Our servers are catching their breath. This usually resolves quickly.

generic.headline: Something unexpected happened.
generic.body: We hit a bump, but we're looking into it. Your data is safe.

rateLimit.headline: Let's slow down a moment.
rateLimit.body: We limit how fast things can happen to keep everything running smoothly. Ready to continue in {countdown}.

notFound.headline: That page doesn't exist.
notFound.body: It might have moved, or the link might be wrong.

unauthorized.headline: You need to sign in first.
unauthorized.body: This content is for signed-in users. It only takes a moment.

validation.email: That doesn't look like an email. Mind checking?

offline.banner: You're offline. We'll save your progress and sync when you're back.

featureBlocked.headline: This needs a connection.
featureBlocked.body: You're offline right now. We'll be here when you're back.

request.headline: Ready to talk?
request.body: Ferni needs microphone access to hear you. We only listen when you're speaking—never in the background.

denied.headline: We can't hear you.
denied.body: Microphone access was denied. You can change this in your browser settings.

request.headline: Stay in the loop?
request.body: We'll only notify you for things that matter—like when we're thinking of you.

denied.headline: Notifications are off.
denied.body: That's okay—you can always turn them on later in settings.

streak.60: 60 days. This is who you are now.

peter.title: Research Specialist
peter.tagline: Curious by nature, thorough by design
peter.greeting: I've been thinking about something. Want to explore it together?

alex.title: Communications Coach
alex.greeting: Let's get clear on what you want to say.

maya.title: Habit Architect
maya.greeting: Ready to work on something consistent?
